payload.answer: I can treat this as a new preference/routine, but I won’t save it without your choice.
repair_options: Add as a separate routine preference: usually prefers to read technical papers in the morning before checking email.
Keep both this preference and any existing morning/email/reading preferences separately, if present.
Do not add this as a memory.
